title: Sekhareswar Temple
tagline: Sekhareswar Temple — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: The Sekhareswar Temple is a Hindu temple situated in Lathanga village in Jagatsinghpur district of Orissa, India.
overview.description: The Sekhareswar Temple is a Hindu temple situated in Lathanga village in Jagatsinghpur district of Orissa, India. Sekhareswar in Sanskrit refers to the Godhead. The temple is dedicated to Shiva. The Varuni Yatra of Sekhareswar is one thousand years old.

topPlaces.name: Lathanga, Odisha
topPlaces.description: Lathanga is a village in the state of Odisha, India.

topPlaces.name: Pankapal
topPlaces.description: Pankapal is a moderate size village in the district of Jagatsinghpur of Odisha State, India. The history of the village can be traced back to the 18th century when two brothers from the Puri region migrated and settled down in the present-day Pankapal.

topPlaces.name: Hasim nagar
topPlaces.description: Hasim Nagar is a small village in Odisha, India. It belongs to the Jagatsinghpur district.

items.note: Lathanga is a village in the state of Odisha, India.

Pankapal is a moderate size village in the district of Jagatsinghpur of Odisha State, India. The history of the village can be traced back to the 18th century when two brothers from the Puri region migrated and settled down in the present-day Pankapal.
Hasim Nagar is a small village in Odisha, India. It belongs to the Jagatsinghpur district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sekhareswar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sekhareswar Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sekhareswar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (65 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhubaneswar Railway Station (63 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sekhareswar Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sekhareswar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sekhareswar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sekhareswar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sekhareswar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Lathanga, Odisha, Pankapal, Hasim nagar.
